name: hse-core
description: NZ/AU workplace health & safety Claude Agent Skills — an orchestrator plus specialists for critical risk, governance, NZ/AU duties, high-risk work, investigation and procedures, and prosecution learning; a full tier of hazard subject-matter experts; equipment/plant specialists (cranes, forklifts, lifting & rigging, EWPs, scaffolding, pressure equipment); and sector specialists spanning construction, transport & logistics, manufacturing, food processing, agriculture, horticulture, forestry, electricity supply, geothermal, oil & gas, mining & quarrying, fishing & aquaculture, maritime & ports, healthcare, waste & recycling, rail, hospitality and more.
